title: Proofmode
note: Source for Proofmode's open-source media capture, notarization, verification, provenance, C2PA, and decentralized preservation positioning.

title: guardianproject/proofmode-android
note: Repository source for Proofmode Android licensing, public code, features, signatures, hashes, sensor metadata, and release activity.

title: Content Credentials: C2PA Technical Specification
publisher: Coalition for Content Provenance and Authenticity
note: Technical source for media provenance, signed claims, manifests, validation, content binding, and tamper-evident media workflows.

title: OpenTimestamps
note: Source for Bitcoin-backed timestamp proofs, hash-based document stamping, independent verification, and privacy-preserving timestamp commitments.

title: B-CoC: A Blockchain-based Chain of Custody for Evidences Management in Digital Forensics
note: Research source documenting blockchain-based chain-of-custody concepts for digital evidence integrity and ownership traceability.
